mapper.select: SELECT room_code FROM sync_room WHERE game_seq = #{gameSeq} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT room_code FROM sync_room WHERE game_seq = #{gameSeq} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sync_room (game_seq, room_code, status) VALUES (#{gameSeq}, #{roomCode}, 'OPEN')
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sync_room WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL 15 HOUR
